nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (spec-writer)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Spec Writer agent, defining capabilities for producing detailed technical specifications from high-level requirements.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (spec-writer)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Spec Writer agent, covering specification templates, requirements gathering, and technical document generation workflows.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (university-professor)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the University Professor agent, a large manifest defining its educational, adaptive teaching, and knowledge explanation capabilities.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (university-professor)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the University Professor agent, covering its adaptive teaching strategies, curriculum design, and multi-level explanation protocols.
